scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:client && npm run test:unit:server
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:client && npm run test:integration:server
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:all:no-e2e: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
